sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Terminology 7:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Terminology 7:1
items.html: Contemplating the manners of cause and consequence in order to scrutinize all the consequences that are born and emerge from something is called Bina.
